reason: PM5 rows are material recirculation diagnostics with 0 ordinary scoreable rows.
LitRev supports named pressure basis, geometry, velocity basis, split, and UQ, not universal multipliers.
Jacket, passive, radiation, heater efficiency, wall/storage, and residual paths must stay separated.
Material reverse or secondary flow invalidates single-stream ordinary coefficient names.
Predictive rows must not consume validation temperatures or realized CFD outputs at runtime.
